zh.lifeSummary: 當William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby於1372年4月25日出生在英國貝德福爾盧頓時，他的父親Henry de Ferrers17歲，母親Johanna Poynings16歲。他於1388年10月10日與Philippa Clifford在英國維斯特莫藍德布盧加姆 卡素結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1445年5月18日在英國艾可武德哈姆 費雷斯享年73歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾韋斯特 蘭頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby于1372年4月25日出生在英国貝德福爾盧頓时，他的父亲Henry de Ferrers17岁，母亲Johanna Poynings16岁。他于1388年10月10日与Philippa Clifford在英国維斯特莫藍德布盧加姆 卡素结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1445年5月18日在英国艾可武德哈姆 費雷斯享年73岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾韋斯特 蘭頓。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby was born on 25 April 1372, in Luton, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Henry de Ferrers, was 17 and his mother, Johanna Poynings, was 16. He married Philippa Clifford on 10 October 1388, in Brougham Castle, Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 18 May 1445, in Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in West Langton, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby est né le 25 avril 1372, à Luton, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Ferrers, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Johanna Poynings, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Clifford le 10 octobre 1388, à Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1445, à Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à West Langton, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby am 25. April 1372 in Luton, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Ferrers 17 und seine Mutter Johanna Poynings 16. Er hat am 10. Oktober 1388 in Brougham Castle, Westmorland, England Philippa Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Mai 1445 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England und wurde in West Langton, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby è nato il il 25 aprile 1372 nel Luton, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Ferrers, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Poynings, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Clifford il 10 ottobre 1388, nel Brougham Castle, Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 maggio 1445, nel Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a West Langton, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Grobyが1372年4月25日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアルトンで生まれた時，父Henry de Ferrersは17歳，母Johanna Poyningsは16歳であった。1388年10月10日にイギリスウエストモーランドブロウアム カストルでPhilippa Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1445年5月18日にイギリスエセックスウッドハム フエレルズで73歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウエスト ラントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby(이)가 1372년 4월 25일 영국 베드퍼드실르 루턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Ferrers(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Poynings(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1388년 10월 10일 영국 웨스트모를랜드 브루그함 카스틀에서 Philippa Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 5월 18일 영국 에세스 우드함 페레르스에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 웨스트 랭턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby nasceu em 25 de abril de 1372, em Luton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Ferrers, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Poynings, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Clifford em 10 de outubro de 1388, em Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1445, em Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em West Langton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby родился 25 апреля 1372 г. в местности лутон, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Ferrers было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Poynings, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Clifford 10 октября 1388 г. в местности броугам кастл, вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 мая 1445 г. в местности вудхам фиррирс, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности вест лангтон, лисестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Philippa Clifford el 10 de octubre de 1388, en Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1445, en Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en West Langton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
